name: Unilever PLC
description: Unilever PLC is a leading global consumer goods company that provides a wide range of products across the beauty, wellbeing, personal care, home care, and nutrition sectors. With a portfolio featuring hundreds of iconic brands, the company focuses on meeting daily consumer needs through innovation, science, and technology. Headquartered in London, England, Unilever operates internationally, emphasizing sustainable business practices and a commitment to improving livelihoods while delivering high-quality products that touch billions of lives every day.
